title: Markdownリンク解析・リンクインデックス構築

tasks.name: FileLinkInfo構造体 + file_linksテーブル定義
changes: Added file_links CREATE TABLE and indexes to create_tables()

tasks.name: SymbolStore CRUDメソッド追加
changes: Added insert_file_links() method (bulk insert with unchecked_transaction)
Extended delete_by_file() to also delete from file_links table

tasks.name: IndexError SchemaVersionMismatch正規化
changes: Modified From<SymbolStoreError> for IndexError to map SchemaVersionMismatch variant

tasks.name: SearchError SchemaVersionMismatch
changes: Modified From<SymbolStoreError> for SearchError to map SchemaVersionMismatch
Added Display implementation with clean/index guidance message

tasks.name: StatusError SchemaVersionMismatch
changes: Modified get_symbol_count() to detect SchemaVersionMismatch and show eprintln warning, returning 0

tasks.name: index_markdown_file()リンク格納統合
changes: Added symbol_store: Option<&SymbolStore> parameter to index_markdown_file()
Added link processing flow: delete_by_file -> tantivy write -> filter links -> truncate at 10000 -> create FileLinkInfo -> insert_file_links
Updated index_file_and_upsert() to pass symbol_store to index_markdown_file()

tasks.name: run_incremental()削除処理拡張
changes: Removed is_code() condition from delete processing - now calls symbol_store.delete_by_file() for all file types
